description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: 1941 United States 105 mm field howitzer
military exploration beyond the area occupied by friendly forces
description_wiki: In military operations, military reconnaissance () or scouting is the exploration of an area by military forces to obtain information about enemy forces, the terrain, and civil activities in the area of operations.

description: armored vehicle classification designed for troop transport
man-portable weapon designed to attack tanks and armored targets firing an unguided rocket
description_wiki: A rocket-propelled grenade (RPG), also known colloquially as a rocket launcher, is a portable, reusable, unguided, shoulder-launched, anti-tank grenade launcher that launches rockets equipped with a shaped-charge explosive warhead.

description: saint in the Catholic and Orthodox church
description_wiki: Saint Christopher (Greek: Ἅγιος Χριστόφορος, romanized: Hágios Christóphoros, lit. 'Christ-bearer'; Latin: Sanctus Christophorus), also called Christopher of Lycea, is a legendary figure venerated by several Christian denominations as a martyr and saint.

description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: meal supplied by the US military
description_wiki: The K-ration was a United States military ration consisting of three separately boxed meal units: breakfast, dinner, and supper.

description: meal supplied by the US military
description_wiki: The C-ration (officially Field Ration, Type C) was a United States military ration consisting of prepared, canned wet foods.

description: combined military forces of Vietnam
description_wiki: The People's Army of Vietnam (PAVN) is the national military force of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam and the armed wing of the ruling Communist Party of Vietnam (CPV).

description: city of Vietnam
description_wiki: Da Nang (Vietnamese: Đà Nẵng, pronounced [ʔɗaː˨˩ naŋ˨˩˦]), also spelt Danang, is the fourth largest municipality in Vietnam by population and the largest by geographical area.

description: Marginal sea in the Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: The South China Sea is a marginal sea of the Western Pacific Ocean.

description: largest city in Vietnam
description_wiki: Ho Chi Minh City (HCMC; Vietnamese: Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, IPA: [tʰaɲ˨˩ fow˦˥ ho˨˩ cɪj˦˥ mɨn˧˧] ), also known as Saigon, is the most populous municipality of Vietnam, with a population of more than 14 million in 2025.

description: capital of Cambodia
description_wiki: Phnom Penh is the capital and most populous city of Cambodia.

description: American actor (1930-1980)
description_wiki: Terrence Stephen McQueen (March 24, 1930 – November 7, 1980) was an American actor.

description: United States Army installation in El Paso County, Colorado, United States
description_wiki: Fort Carson is a United States Army post located directly south of Colorado Springs in El Paso, Pueblo, Fremont, and Huerfano counties, Colorado, United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Colorado is a landlocked state in the Mountain West subregion of the Western United States.

description: year
description_wiki: 1975 (MCMLXXV) was a common year starting on Wednesday of the Gregorian calendar, the 1975th year of the Common Era (CE) and Anno Domini (AD) designations, the 975th  year of the 2nd millennium, the 75th  year of the 20th century, and the  6th   year of the 1970s decade.

description: county seat of Monroe County, Florida, United States
state of the United States of America
description_wiki:
Florida (  FLORR-ih-də; Spanish: [floˈɾiða] ) is a state in the Southeastern and South Atlantic
regions of the United States.

description: city in and county seat of Koochiching County, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: International Falls (sometimes referred to as I-Falls) is a city in and the county seat of Koochiching County, Minnesota, United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Minnesota is a state in the Upper Midwestern region of the United States.
